name: Jahan
description: CR7 is a vibrant, aromatic fougere designed for the modern, active man. Bold and energetic, it combines bergamot, lavender, cardamom, tobacco, cinnamon, sandalwood, and musk to create a sporty yet sophisticated scent. Ideal for casual outings or evening occasions, it embodies confidence, energy, and masculinity.
features: Energizing blend of bergamot, cardamom, and lavender
Warm notes of tobacco, cinnamon, sandalwood, and musk
Perfect for casual or evening occasions
